---
lang: it
date-meta: now
params:
  startYear: NULL
  endYear: NULL
  nPatients: NULL
  hospitalName: NULL
  signatory: "Demo Signatory"
  signatureImagePath: "demo_signature.png"
  dataFilePath: NULL
  departmentCode: "DE_BER_CHARITE_CVK_NEO"
  token: NULL
---

```{r}
#| label: Initialise Locale
locale <- "it_IT.UTF-8"
sR <- modifyList(
  yaml::read_yaml("../common.it.yaml", handlers = list('bool#no' = function(x) x)),
  yaml::read_yaml("_sR.it.yaml", handlers = list('bool#no' = function(x) x))
)
```

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _content.qmd >}}
